items.title: Noname – “Squatter” (Feat. DRAM)
items.summary: We're theoretically getting a new Noname record sometime soon, but we still don't know when. Last year, the hugely gifted, idiosyncratic Chicago rapper announced plans to follow 2023's Sundial with a new mixtape called Cartoon Radio and shared the single "Hundred Acres." But Noname didn't announce a release date back then, and she still hasn't done it.

items.title: Victoria Monét Announces New Album Frequency Of Love: Hear “Reach Out”
items.summary: Victoria Monét is going for it! The Atlanta-born singer started out as one of Ariana Grande's main co-writers before becoming a straight-up R&B star herself with her excellent 2023 album Jaguar II. She won the Grammy for Best New Artist, and then she largely stepped back for a little while.
items.audio: audio/Victoria Monét Announces New Album Frequency Of Lo.mp3

items.title: Militarie Gun – “World’s Always Burning” (Feat. Mannequin Pussy’s Missy Dabice)
items.summary: Last year, the Californian quasi-hardcore warriors Militarie Gun leaned into their more melodic and alt-rock sides on sophomore album God Save The Gun, sharpening their songwriting skills while still making something physical and exciting. It was one of our favorites of the year. Today, Militarie Gun announce a deluxe version of God Save The Gun with three new tracks.
